description: Nerve Integration Contract — defines what 'persistent integration' means for Autonomous Evolution in ILMA core

definition.nerve_integration: Autonomous Evolution Orchestrator is callable from the main task path for heavy+ missions, with pre-task retrieval, actor-critic loop, reflection, and lesson storage all operational.
definition.persistent: Configuration survives process restarts, lessons persist in JSONL, config is loaded from disk on every heavy+ task
definition.guarded_task_path: The task_entrypoint.py is the integration point — heavy/super_heavy/extreme/autonomous_evolution tasks go through it by default

pre_task_retrieval_required.behavior: Must call lesson retrieval before planning

judge_required.behavior: Must evaluate every artifact before finalization

reflection_required_on_fail.behavior: Must run reflection engine when judge returns FAIL

lesson_memory_write_required_on_recovery.behavior: Must store lesson when failure is recovered (judge returns PASS after FAIL)

checkpoint_required_every_n_iterations.behavior: Must produce checkpoint trace every N iterations

max_iterations_required.behavior: Must stop loop when max_iterations reached

unsafe_action_abort.behavior: Must abort and report when Decision.ABORT is returned

evidence_id_required.behavior: Every VERIFIED capability must have evidence_id

final_report_truth_section_required.behavior: Final report must include truth section with exact counts

no_overclaim_gate_required.behavior: Must block claims not supported by evidence
